summary: Stunning audience recording with crystal‑clear sound and a standout Tennessee Jed, capturing the full acoustic set in superb detail.
review: The tape is praised for its remarkable clarity, stereo imaging and clean vocals – rare for an AUD source. The performance shines especially on Tennessee Jed and the complete acoustic set, delivering the energy of a two‑show run in New Orleans. A few listeners note a hint of digital noise reduction, but overall the show and recording are considered top‑tier.

ai_rating.rationale: Consistently high praise for both musical performance (70% weight) and audio fidelity (30% weight); only minor criticism about mastering keeps the rating just below perfect.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Audible clarity, excellent stereo separation and vocal definition; one reviewer mentions possible digital noise reduction but no major dropouts or muffling.

show_quality.setlist_flow: The set includes a full acoustic portion that many fans have long awaited, flowing naturally into the electric set and maintaining high energy throughout.
